title: Enable Or Disable Feature Gates — Check control plane component manifests
text:
View the feature gates configured in the static pod manifest:
kubectl -n kube-system get pod kube-apiserver-<node-name> -o yaml
|
grep feature-gates

Use the kubelet's configz endpoint:
kubectl proxy --port
=
8001
&
curl -sSL
"http://localhost:8001/api/v1/nodes/<node-name>/proxy/configz"
|
grep featureGates -A
5
Or check the configuration file directly on the node:
cat /var/lib/kubelet/config.yaml
|
grep -A
10
featureGates
